title: Clarify terminal semantics for retired duplicate tasks
description: After TASK-099 released, validate_task_graph.py reports the graph stalled because the only non-terminal task is TASK-096, intentionally BLOCKED as a retired duplicate. Decide and implement the correct MAP semantics: either introduce/document a terminal duplicate/cancelled state, adjust validation to treat retired duplicates as non-stalling, or close TASK-096 through an approved terminal path. Keep SQLite, task JSON, and workflow graph consistent.
acceptance_criteria: A graph containing only terminal tasks plus retired duplicate TASK-096 validates without requiring fake ready work
TASK-096 status semantics are consistent across SQLite, task JSON, and workflow/task_graph.json
The chosen duplicate/retired-task policy is documented or encoded in validation so future agents do not reintroduce the stall
